block_repair_summary.F1: seed derived from frozen bank hash; no author-selected seed; no redraw loop
block_repair_summary.F2: prompt fixtures cover full 20-packet canary set
block_repair_summary.F3: T1 detector validation uses synthetic dirty prompt
block_repair_summary.F4: T5 uses one-sided exact binomial skew check
block_repair_summary.F5: runtime manifest/payloads split from post-hoc scoring map
block_repair_summary.F6: canary samples 10 sibling pairs with both sides
block_repair_summary.F7: contradiction_free criterion backed by structural gate failures
block_repair_summary.F8: max output budget set to 1024 and checked by T6
block_repair_summary.second_F1: runtime manifest sorted by opaque ID hash order; ordering parity test added
block_repair_summary.second_F2: runtime manifest strips bank hash and seed material
block_repair_summary.second_F3: first-turn bank frozen to disk and hash-pinned
block_repair_summary.third_B1: private runtime salt uses build-time secrets.token_hex(32), stored only in post-hoc scoring map
block_repair_summary.third_B2: live executor surface run_blind_runtime_manifest added and bound by filesystem-isolation test
block_repair_summary.third_B3: registered runner import closure is scanned for truth reachability
